text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Good morning. I've been waiting for you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you look refreshed. It seems like you had a
good rest last night too.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Which must mean... we're both fully rejuvenated!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! Taking a day off was apparently
worthwhile after all! A wise choice, if I say so
myself!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...I wonder if I've praised you a bit too much. But
sometimes words of appreciation are necessary, no?
Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like she's trying to praise my schedule
management skills... I'll just say it's the thought
that counts.
